examples: Her dresses were in jewel patterns, which have been seen before on many runways, but looked cool when the frills spilled down one side of the slender dresses.
We've agreed to cut the frills, remember?
Inspiration: We're a no-frills kind of couple.
The usual coffee shop frills are also conspicuously absent: there are no cakes, salads or sandwiches.
If you want to save a bundle, skip the frills and do the subdivision work yourself.
